description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. Fragment (upper part only). Damaged and difficult to read. Seems to be an acknowledgment by  [...] b. Ismāʿīl al-Ḥalabī al-Mutaṭabbib (the Aleppan physician) in l. 2 and also mentions [...] b. Isḥāq al-Ḥalabī in l. 3. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
